positive: A detailed, symmetrical, and central composition featuring a mystical, bioluminescent celestial fox curled peacefully. The fox should be rendered in a clean, stylized, vector art aesthetic, possessing a strong, defined silhouette. It is surrounded by orbiting elements of crescent moons, nebula clouds, and constellations, which glow with deep sapphire, vibrant turquoise, and subtle amethyst hues. The overall style must emphasize clean lines and high contrast suitable for apparel printing. Use stippling and fine dot work to create depth and texture within the glowing elements. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, high resolution, intricate detailing, digital matte painting, minimalist complexity.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noise, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, amateur, logo, trademark, dirty background
